title: Letterboxd CLI (My Movies)
desc: A simple CLI tool for Letterboxd enthusiasts. Features a hybrid recommendation engine using semantic search (ChromaDB), automated data syncing via Puppeteer, and local caching with SQLite.

title: Chatterbox Logging Engine
desc: A high-performance log aggregation and monitoring tool. Utilizes HTMX for real-time dashboard updates and Express.js for efficient stream processing.

title: FXQL Parser & Exchange API
desc: A specialized NestJS application implementing a custom Domain Specific Language (FXQL) for financial currency exchange operations.

title: CHAP-IDYZZ Multi-Source API
desc: An API orchestration system integrating MongoDB and Airtable. Demonstrates sophisticated multi-persistence patterns and third-party API consumption.

title: Job Listing
desc: Full-stack job board application showcasing scalable backend architecture and clean UI patterns.
